task_completion.description: JStock application is open and the 'My Portfolio' view is active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JStock application window is visible, and the 'My Portfolio' tab or section is currently selected and displaying a table of stocks.

task_completion.description: A comment has been added to the AAPL position.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the portfolio table, locate the row for 'AAPL'. The 'Comment' column for this row must contain text, indicating it was edited.

task_completion.description: A comment has been added to the MSFT position.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the portfolio table, locate the row for 'MSFT'. The 'Comment' column for this row must contain text, indicating it was edited.

task_completion.description: The exact required text was used for the high-value position comments.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Read the text in the 'Comment' column for both AAPL and MSFT. The text must exactly match 'High Value - Review Quarterly'.

task_completion.description: The NVDA position (which is below the threshold) was left unannotated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the portfolio table, locate the row for 'NVDA'. The 'Comment' column for this row must be empty or in its original unedited state.

integrity.description: The agent used the JStock graphical user interface to make the changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show JStock dialog boxes (like the 'Buy' or 'Edit' transaction dialogs) or direct table editing, rather than a terminal window modifying underlying XML/CSV files.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual JStock application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application shown must be JStock (identifiable by its UI, icons, and layout), not a generic spreadsheet program like Excel or a text editor.

integrity.description: No other fields were incorrectly modified during the audit.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Purchase Value', 'Shares', and 'Symbol' columns for all stocks should remain at their original values; only the 'Comment' field should be altered.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Targets for annotation: AAPL (Purchase Value 18520.0) and MSFT (Purchase Value 18725.0). Non-target: NVDA (Purchase Value 15382.5). The required comment text is exactly 'High Value - Review Quarterly'.
